hero.title: Eurasian Consulting Consortium
hero.subtitle: Authorized representative in the Republic of Kazakhstan and EAEU member states

about.title: About the company
about.description: Eurasian Consulting Consortium LLP is a legal entity registered in the Republic of Kazakhstan acting as an authorized representative of foreign manufacturers.
about.mission: To provide foreign manufacturers with reliable and lawful presence in the markets of Kazakhstan and the Eurasian Economic Union.
benefits: Professional team of technical regulation experts
Practical experience with domestic and foreign manufacturers
End-to-end support from consultation to full project management

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive support for product conformity assessment

authorized.title: Authorized representative
authorized.description: Representation of foreign manufacturers in Kazakhstan and the EAEU

certification.title: EAEU TR certification
certification.description: Support for conformity assessment under technical regulations

declaration.title: Conformity declaration
declaration.description: Preparation and registration of product conformity declarations

documentation.title: Technical documentation
documentation.description: Development and adaptation of technical documentation for EAEU requirements

testing.title: Product testing

marking.title: EAC marking

legislation.title: Legislation and useful information
